rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into the implementation scope when binding to implementation-specific outputs or subcomponent connections.
Preserve AADL component type scope boundaries: do not reference subcomponents or implementation-only ports in component type annexes.
generic_rules: Bind output derivations to implementation annexes when they depend on internal structure not visible at the type level.
Only use AADL features (ports, constants) explicitly declared in the model scope within AGREE annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'assign output = expression;' in implementation annexes for direct output bindings.
Declare helpers with 'eq name : type = expression;' when intermediate logic is needed.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or internal paths in component type annexes.
Do not assume AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) are visible as variables in AGREE.
